description: Composition Yellow and navy blue checked shirt, made of 100% cotton, has a mock mandarin neck white shirt stitched inside, yellow stitch detailing along the shoulder blade, short sleeves with attached panels that has piping on the edges, two chest pockets with embroidery on the right one, a full length buttoned placket and a curved hemline Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Get casual, get comfortable in style with this checked shirt from lee. The half sleeves allow you double the shirt as a jacket over a full sleeves t-shirt and a regular shirt as just a style statement on its own. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that cool, casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
